hero.subline: Embedded Software Engineer with strong background in embedded systems, automotive bus technologies, RTOS, C/C++, microcontrollers, and system-level project implementation. Experienced in applied engineering projects across CubeSat systems, automotive communication, and embedded software training.

coach.name: Mahmoud Ali Ahmed
coach.role: Embedded Software Engineer | Automotive & Embedded Systems Mentor
coach.university: B.Sc. in Communication & Electronics Engineering, Assiut University
snapshot: Embedded Software Engineer with strong focus on automotive and microcontroller-based systems
Worked on communication protocols and buses including CAN, CAN-FD, LIN, UDS, and Ethernet
Hands-on experience with STM32, AVR, ESP8266, bootloaders, RTOS, and embedded Linux topics
Contributed to CubeSat and automotive engineering projects with implementation responsibility on embedded software components
Built practical experience through IMT School training tracks, ITIDA automotive scholarship, and EGSA internship
achievements: Completed multiple embedded systems and automotive training tracks at IMT School
Selected for ITIDA Automotive Scholarship covering RTOS, automotive standards, software engineering, testing, cybersecurity, and embedded Linux
Completed internship at the Egyptian Space Agency in onboard computer work for CubeSat systems
Worked on CubeSat graduation project with onboard computer and ground station control system responsibilities
Worked on automotive communication and diagnostics systems in motorsport-related engineering work
projects: CubeSat Embedded System — onboard computer implementation, subsystem data construction/deconstruction, scheduled task handling, and ground station communication support
Automotive Bus Network — communication bus implementations using MCP2515, MCP2517-FD, and Ethernet controllers
STM32 Bootloader Project — bootloader implementation including hex parsing and flash interface
IoT with ESP8266 — Wi-Fi-connected embedded application using ESP8266
Smart Home Embedded Project — UART Bluetooth and NEC-protocol IR sensor-based smart home system
Automotive Diagnostics System — CAN communication, diagnostics, error storage, and display interfacing in embedded automotive context

items.q: How can I request Mahmoud for coaching or training?
items.a: Use the WhatsApp button to send your training needs. Coach Academy will coordinate the suitable format, schedule, and learning goals.

items.q: What are Mahmoud’s main areas of expertise?
items.a: Embedded systems, automotive embedded software, C/C++, RTOS, microcontrollers, communication protocols, and practical embedded project implementation.

items.q: Does Mahmoud have hands-on project experience?
items.a: Yes. His background includes CubeSat engineering work, automotive communication systems, bootloaders, IoT applications, and embedded software training projects.

footer.blurb: Empowering talent through hands-on, industry-aligned tech coaching.
